title: Add information about multi-arch image to README
body:
Also update to the correct one information about required env variables
for multi-arch build

Signed-off-by: Yulia Gaponenko <yulia.gaponenko1@de.ibm.com>

comments.body: @barthy1 a few tiny nits scattered about, otherwise it looks great.  Thanks so much for whipping this up so quickly!
and now needs a rebase to boot.
